top_signals.title: Ethylene plant operating rate hits record low in Japan
top_signals.summary: Ethylene, made from naphtha derived from crude oil, is used as a material for plastics and fibers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US quantum investment includes groups tied to Trump administration
top_signals.summary: Beneficiaries of $2bn push include start-up backed by firm linked to Trump family and another taken public by Pentagon official

top_signals.title: Employment Rights Act will turbocharge creative interview techniques
top_signals.summary: Driven by the upcoming Employment Rights Act, which grants unfair dismissal rights to new starters after July 1, 2026, businesses are expected to increase the use of creative vetting methods – like Duolingo’s “taxi driver test” – but this exposes them to legal risks of inadvertently causing discrimination or generating a costly perception of unfairness [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
